title: Binance Funding Contrarian Scientific Collaboration 56
thesis: Exploit funding extremes, regime shifts, and cross-science features to improve directional funding trades. This variant fuses econometrics researcher guidance with microstructure researcher, ecology/evolution researcher to test stability-aware factor combinations and regime-conditioned edge persistence; order-book stress, queue pressure, and execution-quality asymmetry; survival pressure, niche competition, and adaptive response to decaying edges.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
